title: White Butter Sauce
excerpt: Ingredients 125 ml dry white wine 45 ml very finely chopped onion 65 ml lemon juice 30 ml cream 90 ml very cold butter, cut into 2 cm blocks salt and white pepper to taste Method Heat the wine, onion and lemon juice in a saucepan. Let it boil quickly without a lid until there …
html:
Ingredients

  • 125 ml dry white wine
  • 45 ml very finely chopped onion
  • 65 ml lemon juice
  • 30 ml cream
  • 90 ml very cold butter, cut into 2 cm blocks
  • salt and white pepper to taste
  • Method

Heat the wine, onion and lemon juice in a saucepan. Let it boil quickly without a lid until about 65 ml of liquid remains. Stir in the cream. Once it starts boiling again, add one block of butter and whisk quickly with a balloon whisk until the butter is fully absorbed into the liquid. Add another block of butter and whisk again. Keep going until all the butter has been added and absorbed. If you add too much butter at once, the mixture will split, so be patient.

Season the sauce with salt and pepper and serve immediately.

Makes 4 servings with crumbed fish fillets.

Easy!
